notFound.description: The page you requested could not be found.
notFound.title: Page not found

login.subtitle: Sign in to access your catalog and wishlist.
login.title: Welcome back

register.subtitle: Create a private account to start building your library.
register.title: Create your account

dashboard.description: Your private media library is ready. Jump into cataloging, browse recent additions, or start a wishlist for future pickups.
dashboard.emptyCounts: Add your first entry to start seeing counts here.
dashboard.emptyRecent: Your recent additions will show up here once you save something.

cards.catalogDescription: Manage the items you already own.
cards.wishlistDescription: Track future additions without mixing them into your owned collection.

catalog.label: Catalog
catalog.emptyView: No entries matched this catalog view yet.

wishlist.label: Wishlist
wishlist.emptyView: No entries matched this wishlist view yet.

manualAdd.label: Manual add
manualAdd.description: Create a minimal media record, then link it into your private library.
manualAdd.myCopyDescription: Optional fields stored on your personal library entry.
manualAdd.notesPlaceholder: Edition details, condition, where you found it...

detail.editTitle: Update bucket, format, tags, and notes
detail.manageDescription: Deleting this entry removes only your library row. The media record can still be reused later.

library.confirmDelete: Delete this library entry? The media record will stay available for future entries.

search.description: Find a title, then import it into your catalog or wishlist without exposing raw provider data to the UI.
search.emptyQueryDescription: Search one media type at a time to get normalized results from the matching providers.
search.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading provider results.
search.errorTitle: The search page could not load
search.failurePrefix: Some providers could not be reached:
search.heading: Search across providers
search.noResultsDescription: Try a broader title, a different spelling, or another media type.
search.resultsTitle: {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}} for "{query}"

scan.title: Scan a barcode
scan.description: Use your camera to scan UPC, EAN, and ISBN-style barcodes, review the candidate matches, then choose exactly where to save the item.
scan.supportedFormats: No QR flow in this milestone. Camera scanning stays confirmation-first and never auto-saves.
scan.cameraPaused: The camera has been paused while the current barcode is being reviewed.
scan.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access is unavailable right now. You can retry or continue with manual search.
scan.cameraUnavailable: The camera scanner is unavailable in this browser or on this device.
scan.cameraReadyPlaceholder: The camera will appear here when scanning starts.
scan.permissionHelp: If access is blocked, the manual search fallback remains available.

idle.title: Preparing the scanner
idle.description: The page is getting the scan flow ready.

requestingPermission.title: Requesting camera access
requestingPermission.description: Allow camera access to start scanning physical media barcodes.

ready.title: Scanner is active
ready.description: Point the camera at a UPC, EAN, or ISBN-style barcode.

decoded.title: Barcode captured
decoded.description: The camera has been paused so this scan can be processed only once.

lookingUp.title: Looking up matches
lookingUp.description: Checking local media records and provider candidates for this barcode.

results.title: Review the candidates
results.description: Select the best match, then explicitly choose a bucket before anything is saved.

saving.title: Saving the selected match
saving.description: Creating or reusing the library entry for the chosen bucket.

permissionDenied.title: Camera access was denied
permissionDenied.description: Retry camera access if available, or continue with manual search.

cameraUnavailable.title: Camera scanning is unavailable
cameraUnavailable.description: This device or browser cannot provide the scan camera right now.

lookupEmpty.title: No strong barcode match found
lookupEmpty.description: Continue with manual search using the scanned code or fallback query.

error.title: Scan flow error
error.description: Retry the scanner or continue with manual search.

scan.resultsDescription: Select one match to unlock the save actions below.
scan.selectedEmptyDescription: Candidate cards stay selection-only. Save actions appear here after you choose one result.
scan.providerSelectionDescription: This provider match will be imported only after you explicitly pick catalog or wishlist.
scan.existingBucketsDescription: This local record already has entries in these buckets.
scan.localRecordDescription: This local media record exists already, but you can still add it to another bucket when available.
scan.selectionActive: Selected. Use the action panel below to continue.
scan.manualSearchPrimaryDescription: Use the scanned code or suggested fallback query to keep searching when camera or barcode matching is not enough.
scan.manualSearchSecondaryDescription: Manual search stays available as a secondary path when none of the current candidates looks right.

errors.cameraUnavailable: Unable to start camera scanning on this device.
errors.scanFailed: The scanner could not read the camera feed.

settings.description: Settings will be expanded in milestone 7. This placeholder keeps the localized route structure in place.
settings.title: Settings are coming soon

errors.apiUnavailable: Unable to reach the API right now.
errors.deleteFailed: Unable to delete this entry right now.
errors.duplicateEntry: That item is already saved in this bucket with the same format.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.importMissingEntry: The item was imported, but no library entry was created.
errors.usernameTaken: That username is already in use.
